background.$description: CardSurface background. Aliases color.surface.glass — value unchanged (rgba(28, 28, 30, 0.72)).

border.$description: CardSurface border. Aliases color.border.glass — value unchanged (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)).

radius.$description: CardSurface corner radius. Aliases radius.card — value unchanged (20px).

shadow.$description: CardSurface elevation. Aliases shadow.surface.panel — value unchanged (0 18px 50px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.26)). shadow.surface.panel is used (not the ordinal shadow.md) because its own description explicitly names card-surface as a use case.

background.$description: ModalSheet background. Aliases color.surface.glass — value unchanged (rgba(28, 28, 30, 0.72)).

border.$description: ModalSheet border. Aliases color.border.glass — value unchanged (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)).

radius.$description: ModalSheet corner radius. Aliases radius.card — value unchanged (20px).

shadow.$description: ModalSheet elevation. Aliases shadow.surface.panel — value unchanged (0 18px 50px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.26)).

overlay.$description: Modal backdrop overlay. Aliases color.overlay.default — value unchanged (rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.78)).

background.$description: Badge background. Aliases color.surface.badge — value unchanged (rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22)).

border.$description: Badge base border. Aliases color.border.control — value unchanged (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10)). Tone-specific border overrides (accent/info/secondary/warning/danger) are out of scope for this migration.

radius.$description: Badge corner radius. Aliases radius.pill — value unchanged (999px).

color.$description: Badge text color. Aliases color.text.primary — value unchanged (#f5f7fb).

background.$description: Shared form control (TextInput, SelectInput, TextArea) background. Aliases color.surface.input — value unchanged (rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28)).

border.$description: Shared form control border. Aliases color.border.control — value unchanged (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10)).

radius.$description: Shared form control corner radius. Aliases radius.input — value unchanged (14px).

color.$description: Shared form control text color. Aliases color.text.primary — value unchanged (#f5f7fb).

radius.$description: Button corner radius. Aliases radius.pill — value unchanged (999px).

color.$description: Button base text color. Aliases color.text.primary — value unchanged (#f5f7fb). Base border and background have no Semantic token yet (tracked in TOKEN_DEBT.md) and are intentionally not aliased here — left unchanged in button.css.

radius.$description: IconButton corner radius. Aliases radius.pill — value unchanged (999px).

color.$description: IconButton base text/icon color. Aliases color.text.primary — value unchanged (#f5f7fb). Base border and background have no Semantic token yet (tracked in TOKEN_DEBT.md) and are intentionally not aliased here — left unchanged in icon-button.css.
